title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: Pushpa The Rule Part-02 - 2024 - A smuggling kingpin faces off against a vengeful rival while manipulating politics, making big deals, and navigating tense confrontations. A public apology leads to a dramatic showdown, ending with challenge.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Raja Saheb Ka Kamra
subTitle: A television channel decides to host a reality show in a haunted house with seven contestants. The ghosts, however, have their own motives and obstruct the organisers' plans.

title: Police Power
subTitle: A police officer tries to change his younger brother, who turns to a life of crime, but he fails. He then takes on the local gangster responsible for inciting youngsters towards crime.

title: Om Bheem Bush
subTitle: Three scientists arrive at a village in search of a treasure. However, things take a turn when they explore a haunted palace and discover black magic.

title: No Entry
subTitle: A gorgeous club dancer's ill-timed rendezvous opens up a Pandora's box of lies, absurdities and misunderstandings in the lives of three quirky couples.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Hum Aapke Hain Kaun
subTitle: A man and a woman fall in love, but fate intervenes when she has to marry his older brother for the good of their families.

title: Sikandar
subTitle: A passionate young man faces off against a corrupted system, challenging the existing authorities and injustice that take away the rights of common people.

title: Baaghi 4
subTitle: Following a failed suicide attempt, a man struggles with reality and descends into turmoil. His family faces uncertainty while a concealed truth lures him into a complex maze of obsession and love.

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Kotigobba 3
subTitle: After succeeding at framing ACP Kishore, Satya goes on to become an international criminal. While he gets targeted by Interpol, Kishore seeks revenge on him too, upon being released from prison.

title: Runway 34
subTitle: Upon dealing with the rough climate in Cochin, two pilots make a risky landing in Thiruvananthapuram. But trouble ensues when personnel from the AAIB probes the matter.

title: Mafia
subTitle: A narcotics officer engages in a cat-and-mouse chase to capture a powerful criminal kingpin, not knowing that it could have a connection to a truth in his past.

title: Cycle Kick
subTitle: The lives of two brothers change when they find an abandoned bicycle. However, their happiness is short-lived when the two-wheeler is stolen from them.

title: Thank God
subTitle: An egotistical real estate broker comes face-to-face with God after meeting with an accident. Soon, he is forced to play a game that will put him either in heaven or hell.

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
subTitle: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
subTitle: An influential politician and a headstrong megastar's fiery romance fuelled with passion brings absolute chaos, mania and melancholy.

title: RRR
subTitle: A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: An awards night to honor the best talent from Indian film industry for their contribution to Indian cinema, and recognizing notable performers of 2013.

title: Time Story
subTitle: Sethuraman, a scientist, invents a time-travelling gadget that his evil twin Athreya wants to get hold of. Soon, a bitter battle arises between Sethuraman's son and Athreya.

title: Time Story
subTitle: Sethuraman, a scientist, invents a time-travelling gadget that his evil twin Athreya wants to get hold of. Soon, a bitter battle arises between Sethuraman's son and Athreya.

title: Genius
subTitle: An intelligent orphan joins RAW, an intelligence agency of India. However, during a mission, chaos ensues and all of his comrades are killed. Soon, he decides to seek revenge and comes up with a master plan in order to live in peace with the one he loves.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Natana Suthradari
subTitle: Police investigate a major bank fraud in which customers were duped out of 200 kg of gold worth INR 99 crores for fakes with only 1 gram of gold.

title: Andaaz
subTitle: After his sweetheart Kajal marries another man, Raj moves to Cape Town. He eventually agrees to marry Jiya but is shocked to find that she is Kajal's widowed sister-in-law.

title: Aranmanai 4
subTitle: Suspicious about his sister's death, Saravanan, a lawyer, tries to solve the mystery behind it, only to discover a mysteriously dark force at play.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.
